subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Hearken unto the Call from this far-distant Court; verily it summoneth thee unto God, the One, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد اسمع الندآء من هذا الشطر البعید انه یدعوک الی الله الفرد الخبیر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @personal instructions
